reason: Unflinching teen portrait of isolation, anger, and darkly comic survival.
Larry’s Gen-X malaise captures visible frustration and fleeting hope.
Brash realism and raw humor illuminate a genius wrestling with his demons.
Lyrical, messy love story that refuses to gloss over confusion and pain.
Cocktail of weapons-grade wit and mid-life resetting anxieties.
Low-fi slice of late-20s disillusionment and biting, relatable banter.
Two slackers’ misadventures fuel frustration with a comedic slant.
Unvarnished view of adolescent alienation with a pulse of hope.
Quirky sports agent finds redemption in the absurd and unexpected.
Small-town empathy for a family under pressure, both raw and redemptive.
